ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the package was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the package */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintainer of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "child_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child package */,
  "dependency_type" INTEGER /* Type of dependency (e.g., Depends, Imports) */,
  "imported_methods" TEXT /* List of specific methods imported from the parent package */,
  "imported_classes" TEXT /* List of specific classes imported from the parent package */,
  "required_packages" INTEGER /* Number of required packages */,
  "heaviness" INTEGER /* Heaviness of the dependency on the child package */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_child_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependency_type FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_type") REFERENCES dependency_types ("dependency_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_packages" (
  "project_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-package relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package imported into the project */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Date the package was imported into the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the package in the project (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the package was last updated in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user in the project (e.g., active, left) */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date the user left the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_types" (
  "dependency_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency type */,
  "dependency_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency type */,
  "is_core" TEXT /* Indicates if the dependency type is core (e.g., essential for the package to function) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add, remove, update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or information about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_logs_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "added_version" TEXT /* Version in which the method was added */,
  "deprecated_version" TEXT /* Version in which the method was deprecated (if applicable) */,
  "is_core" TEXT /* Indicates if the method is core (e.g., essential for the package to function) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "added_version" TEXT /* Version in which the class was added */,
  "deprecated_version" TEXT /* Version in which the class was deprecated (if applicable) */,
  "is_core" TEXT /* Indicates if the class is core (e.g., essential for the package to function) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
